acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content:
By accessing or using Meal Maestro, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access or use our service.

These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the service.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.intro: Meal Maestro is an AI-powered recipe management system that allows users to:
features: Store, organize, and manage personal recipe collections
Use AI-powered features for recipe processing and suggestions
Search and filter recipes using various criteria
Track costs associated with AI operations
serviceDescription.disclaimer: The service is provided "as is" and we reserve the right to modify or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time.

accountCreation.title: Account Creation
accountCreation.intro: To use Meal Maestro, you must create an account using Google OAuth. You agree to:
requirements: Maintain the security of your account
Promptly update account information if it changes
Accept responsibility for all activities under your account

accountResponsibilities.title: Account Responsibilities
responsibilities: All content and activity associated with your account
Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
Ensuring your account information remains current

permittedUse.title: Permitted Use
permittedUse.content: You may use Meal Maestro for personal recipe management and related culinary activities.

prohibitedActivities.title: Prohibited Activities
activities: Use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
Share copyrighted recipes without proper attribution
Attempt to reverse engineer, hack, or compromise the service
Upload malicious code, viruses, or harmful content
Use the service to spam, harass, or abuse others
Attempt to circumvent usage limits or cost controls
Resell, redistribute, or commercialize the service without permission
Use automated tools to scrape or extract data
Impersonate others or create fake accounts

yourContent.title: Your Content
yourContent.intro: You retain ownership of all recipes and content you upload to Meal Maestro. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to:
licenses: Store and process your recipes for service functionality
Use AI services to enhance your recipe management experience
Backup and maintain your data for service reliability

ourIntellectualProperty.title: Our Intellectual Property
ourIntellectualProperty.intro: The Meal Maestro service, including its design, features, and underlying technology, is owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not:
restrictions: Copy, modify, or distribute our software or design elements
Use our trademarks or branding without permission
Create derivative works based on our service

thirdPartyContent.title: Third-Party Content
thirdPartyContent.content: When sharing recipes from other sources, you are responsible for respecting copyright and attribution requirements.

aiProcessing.title: AI Processing
aiProcessing.intro: Our AI features use OpenAI's services to process your recipe-related requests. You understand that:
understanding: AI-generated content may not always be accurate or suitable
You should review and verify all AI suggestions before use
AI processing incurs costs that are tracked and displayed transparently
AI features may be subject to usage limits or availability constraints

aiLimitations.title: AI Limitations
aiLimitations.intro: AI-powered features are provided for convenience and enhancement. We do not guarantee:
noGuarantees: Accuracy of AI-generated recipe suggestions or modifications
Safety or suitability of AI-recommended ingredients or methods

serviceAvailability.title: Service Availability
serviceAvailability.intro: We strive to maintain high service availability, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. The service may be temporarily unavailable due to:
causes: Third-party service dependencies (Google, Neon, OpenAI, Vercel)
serviceAvailability.notice: We will make reasonable efforts to provide advance notice of scheduled maintenance.

costTransparency.title: Cost Transparency
costTransparency.intro: Meal Maestro operates on a transparent cost model:
model: The core service is free to use
AI features incur costs based on OpenAI usage
All AI-related costs are tracked and displayed to users
No hidden fees or subscription charges
Users can monitor their usage and associated costs in real-time
costTransparency.disclaimer: We reserve the right to implement usage limits or request contributions to cover operational costs if necessary.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Meal Maestro and its operators shall not be liable for:
limitations: Any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
Loss of data, recipes, or content
Errors in AI-generated content or suggestions
Any harm resulting from following recipe suggestions or modifications
Costs incurred due to service usage
limitationOfLiability.totalLiability: Our total liability for any claim related to the service is limited to the amount you have paid us in the past 12 months (which may be $0 for free users).

terminationByYou.title: Termination by You
terminationByYou.content: You may terminate your account at any time by deleting your account through the service interface or contacting us directly.

terminationByUs.title: Termination by Us
terminationByUs.intro: We may suspend or terminate your account if you:
reasons: Abuse the service or its resources

effectOfTermination.title: Effect of Termination
effects: Your access to the service will cease immediately
Your account data and recipes may be deleted
These terms will remain in effect for applicable provisions
You remain responsible for any costs incurred before termination

changesToTerms.title: Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.intro: We may update these Terms of Service to reflect changes in our service or legal requirements. When we make changes:
process: We will update the "Last updated" date
Significant changes will be communicated through the service
Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of updated terms
If you disagree with changes, you may terminate your account

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.intro: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of the service will be resolved through:
resolution: Legal proceedings in appropriate jurisdiction if necessary

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us:

footer.effective: These terms are effective as of {date} and apply to all users of Meal Maestro.
